english: O Lakshmi-Narasimha, give me the support of your hand
roman: Lakshmi Nrisimha mama dehi kara avalambam

english: I am drowning and confused in the ocean of worldly existence — O Lakshmi-Narasimha give me support
roman: Samsara sagara nimajjana muhyamanam Lakshmi Nrisimha mama dehi karaavalambam

hindi: बालग्रहभूतपिशाचयक्षरक्षांसि, भीतं सदा सदसद् विजहि रोगान्।
english: Children-oppressing planetary spirits, ghosts, Pisachas, Yakshas, Rakshasas — always frighten them away, destroy good and bad diseases
roman: Bala graha bhuta pishachayaksha rakshamsi bhitam sada sad asad vijahi rogan

hindi: मां पाहि पाहि महाप्रभो, लक्ष्मीनृसिंह मम देहि करावलम्बम्॥
english: Protect me, protect me O great Lord — O Lakshmi-Narasimha give me support
roman: Mam pahi pahi Mahaprabho Lakshmi Nrisimha mama dehi karaavalambam

english: I am blind, my great treasure of discrimination has been stolen by the powerful thieves called the senses
roman: Andhasya me hrita viveka maha dhanasya chorairmaha balibhir indriya namadheyaih

hindi: मोहान्धकारकुहरे विनिपातितस्य, लक्ष्मीनृसिंह मम देहि करावलम्बम्॥
english: Cast into the cave of the darkness of delusion — O Lakshmi-Narasimha give me support
roman: Mohaan dhakara kuhare vinipata tasya Lakshmi Nrisimha mama dehi kara avalambam

english: O auspicious dweller of the milk ocean, holder of the discus, whose holy form is adorned with gems on the serpent king
roman: Shrimat payo nidhi niketana chakra pane bhogi ndra bhoga mani rajita punya murte

hindi: योगीशसेव्यपदपद्म जगन्निवास, लक्ष्मीनृसिंह मम देहि करावलम्बम्॥
english: Whose lotus feet are served by the lord of yogis, O dwelling of the universe — give me support
roman: Yogisha sevya pada padma jagat nivasa Lakshmi Nrisimha mama dehi karaavalambam
